description: Diabetes outpatient self-management training services, individual, per 30 minutes

description: Initial preventive physical examination; face-to-face visit, services limited to new beneficiary during the first 12 months of Medicare enrollment

includes: Review of medical and social history

medicalNecessity.notes: One-time benefit within the first 12 months of Part B enrollment.

Review of functional ability and safety

payerRules.frequencyLimit: Once per lifetime within first 12 months of Part B enrollment

description: Visit complexity inherent to evaluation and management associated with medical care services that serve as the continuing focal point for all needed health care services and/or with medical care services that are part of an ongoing care plan

description: Prolonged office or other outpatient evaluation and management service(s) beyond the total time for the primary service; each additional 15 minutes of total time

includes: Each additional 15 minutes beyond primary E/M total time

documentationReqs: Total time documented in medical record

payerRules.notes: Only report with 99205 or 99215. Minimum threshold times apply.
